name: markdown-run
description: Copy & run shell code blocks from Markdown

markdownRun.documentLanguages.description: Editor language modes the actions apply to. Defaults to Markdown and MDC (Nuxt Content); add other language ids (e.g. "mdx") to enable the actions in those documents too.

markdownRun.autoExecute.markdownDescription:
When enabled, "Run" executes the command automatically (sends the text followed by `Enter`). When disabled, the text is only inserted into the terminal without running it, so you can review and run it manually.

⚠️ With this enabled, a code block runs as-is on click, without confirmation.

markdownRun.languages.description: Code block languages on which the "Copy" and "Run" actions are shown. Leave empty to show them on every code block.

markdownRun.showInEditor.description: Show the actions (CodeLens) above code blocks in the editor.

markdownRun.showInPreview.description: Show the Copy button on code blocks in the Markdown preview.

scripts.compile: pnpm run check-types && pnpm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: pnpm run check-types && pnpm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: pnpm run compile-tests && pnpm run compile && pnpm run lint
